creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Austin from comment #0)

Hey Daniel:

It is always useful to test with portlin -AC:

:~/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti % portlint -AC
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1098]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1099]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1100]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1101]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1102]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1103]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1104]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1105]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/net-mgmt/cacti/pkg-plist: [1106]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
WARN: Makefile: [0]: possible direct use of command "file" found. use ${FILE} instead.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 11 warnings found.

I will add gettext into the USES= line for you. Hope this is ok for you.
